title: Type 2 Diabetes portfolio case-study witness (v1)
description: In-silico simulator-consistency witness for the Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (T2DM) portfolio case study. Three separated arrays cover three distinct honest categories. (1) `in_scope_drugs` — FDA-approved CDER drugs whose modality maps cleanly onto an in-repo axis: semaglutide (Ozempic/Wegovy/Rybelsus, Novo Nordisk, FDA 2017 inj. / 2019 oral) and tirzepatide (Mounjaro/Zepbound, Lilly, FDA 2022) — both PEPTIDE sub-axis (:> WEAVE core), parent sim peptide_sim.py with the Zimm-Bragg 1959 real-limit anchor. (2) `cder_in_scope_no_axis_mapping` — the NEW honest category this portfolio introduces: FDA-approved CDER small molecules whose mechanism the new-modality axes were never designed to cover. SGLT2 inhibitors (dapagliflozin/Farxiga 2014, empagliflozin/Jardiance 2014, canagliflozin/Invokana 2013) block renal sodium-glucose cotransporter 2 — a classical transporter-inhibition mechanism that is not PROTAC, not CAM, not COVALENT, not METALLODRUG, not MACROCYCLE, not MWC-allosteric, not RNA-targeting. Schema-const `cder_in_scope_but_no_axis_mapping: true` distinguishes this category from the CBER UNPLACED bucket. (3) `not_in_scope_drugs` — CBER UNPLACED, the SMA-portfolio pattern: insulin analogs (Humalog/Lantus/Tresiba etc.) are CBER protein biologics outside the criterion #4 drug-only/CDER scope. NEVER a therapeutic, clinical, glycemic, weight-loss, cardiovascular, immunogenic, regulatory, or portfolio-recommendation claim (g8 / f2). NOT the deferred 200-disease re-mapping.

in_scope_drugs.description: FDA-approved CDER drugs whose modality maps onto an in-repo axis. Both entries map onto PEPTIDE (:> WEAVE core) and exercise peptide_sim.py via importlib (no fork — governance f3). Each entry carries the parent sim's Zimm-Bragg 1959 real-limit anchor.

cder_in_scope_no_axis_mapping.description: NEW honest category — FDA-approved CDER small molecules whose mechanism the new-modality axes were never designed to cover. Distinct from `not_in_scope_drugs` (CBER UNPLACED): these drugs PASS criterion #4 drug-only/CDER but no expansion-layer axis fits. SGLT2 inhibitors: dapagliflozin, empagliflozin, canagliflozin — renal SGLT2 transporter inhibition is a classical pharmacology mechanism, not a new-modality chemistry (not PROTAC, not CAM, not COVALENT, not METALLODRUG, not MACROCYCLE, not MWC-allosteric, not RNA-targeting). HONEST GAP RECOGNITION — the axis tree was built for new modalities; the honest call is to acknowledge the gap rather than invent a forced placement.

fda_center.description: CDER — this category PASSES the drug-only/CDER criterion #4 (unlike the CBER UNPLACED bucket which FAILS it).

axis.description: Null — no expansion-layer axis maps onto the mechanism. The criterion #4 gate is PASSED (CDER); the axis-mapping gap is INSIDE the criterion #4 boundary, not outside.

in_scope_by_cder_discipline.description: True — the drug satisfies the CDER scope discipline (criterion #4).

no_axis_mapping.description: True — no in-repo expansion-layer axis maps onto the drug's mechanism.

cder_in_scope_but_no_axis_mapping.description: Schema-const distinguishing this NEW honest category from CBER UNPLACED. CDER-pass + axis-tree-gap — distinct from CBER-fail.

reported_not_run.description: Reported in the witness for honest portfolio coverage; NOT modeled (no axis sim run — no axis fits).

not_in_scope_drugs.description: FDA-approved T2DM drugs that are HONESTLY UNPLACED — fall outside the criterion #4 drug-only/CDER scope boundary; CBER biologics. Insulin analogs (Humalog/Lantus/Tresiba/NovoLog/Levemir/Fiasp etc.) are recombinant protein biologics regulated by CBER. Same UNPLACED pattern as the SMA portfolio's Zolgensma row and the AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape @N genetic_medicine_status / @N adc_status / @N theranostic_status notes.

fda_center.description: CBER (biologics) or CDRH (devices) — these centers fall outside the criterion #4 drug-only/CDER scope.

axis.description: Null — UNPLACED by design (no code axis for this modality).

unplaced_precedent_in_repo.description: Pointer to the in-repo precedent for honest UNPLACED handling (e.g. AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape @N genetic_medicine_status, case_studies/sma_portfolio/ Zolgensma row).

reported_not_run.description: Reported in the witness for honest portfolio coverage; NOT modeled (no axis sim run).

cross_axis_touch_point.description: Pointer to the G4 PEPTIDE × MACROCYCLE cross — peptide-chemistry side of the GLP-1 class touches stapled/macrocyclic peptide engineering. This case study NOTES the touch-point without re-running G4; G4 stays the canonical PEPTIDE × MACROCYCLE bridge.
